copy.description:
Brookline Select Board Meeting - March 10, 2026

During the Brookline Select Board meeting on March 10, 2026, various topics were discussed including preparations for upcoming events, community development projects, and budget concerns related to housing and public services. There was a notable focus on efforts to modernize the green line program and improve accessibility at train stations. The board also reviewed grant proposals and the implications of potential zoning changes in the Chestnut Hill commercial area.
